items.phrase: What I'm trying to say is…
items.example: What I'm trying to say is that we need more practical experience.

items.translation: Что ты имеешь в виду под…?

items.example: I'm not sure I follow. Can you explain?
In my view, qualifications are not the most important thing.

items.phrase: I see what you mean, but…
items.example: I see what you mean, but experience matters too.
Having said that, I agree that hard work is important.
For one thing, online courses are more flexible.

items.phrase: Let me give you an example.
items.example: Let me give you an example: my friend learned to code online.
